sections.title: Speaking to the City guard during Watchtower

lines.speaker: City Guard
lines.text: Grrrr, what business have you here ?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am on an errand...

lines.speaker: City Guard
lines.text: So what do you want with me ?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am an ogre killer come to destroy you!

lines.speaker: City Guard
lines.text: I would like to see you try!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I seek passage into the skavid caves

lines.speaker: City Guard
lines.text: Is that so...

lines.speaker: City Guard
lines.text: You humour me small thing, answer this riddle and I will help you... I want you to bring me an item

lines.speaker: City Guard
lines.text: I will give you all the letters of this item, you work out what it is...

lines.speaker: City Guard
lines.text: My first is in days, but not in years. My second is in evil, and also in tears. My third is in all, but not in none

lines.speaker: City Guard
lines.text: My fourth is in hot, but not in sun. My fifth is in heaven, and also in hate. My sixth is in fearing, but not in fate.

lines.speaker: City Guard
lines.text: My seventh is in plush, but not in place. My eighth is in nine, but not in eight. My last is in earth, and also in in great

lines.speaker: City Guard
lines.text: My whole is an object, that magic will make. It brings wrack and ruin to all in it's wake...

lines.speaker: City Guard
lines.text: Now how long I wonder, will this riddle take?

sections.title: Using the death rune on the guard

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I worked it out!

lines.speaker: City Guard
lines.text: Well well.. the imp has done it!

lines.speaker: City Guard
lines.text: Thanks for the rune

lines.speaker: City Guard
lines.text: This is what you be needing...

sections.title: Talking to him after the player has given him the rune

lines.speaker: City guard
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any other riddles for me?

lines.speaker: City guard
lines.text: Yes, what looks good on a plate with salad?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know...

lines.speaker: City guard
lines.text: You! Now go, and bother me no more.)

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A nice pizza?

lines.speaker: City guard
lines.text: Grr! Think you are a comedian, eh? Get lost!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have lost the map you gave me.

lines.speaker: City guard
lines.text: What's the point? Take this one and go away!

lines.speaker: City guard
lines.text: You imps always store things in places and forget. Go look for it.

lines.speaker: City guard
lines.text: Are you blind? What is that you are carrying?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that map...
